reason: Core diagnosis schema and summary semantics must preserve original severity while adding blocking-only aggregation.
Pilot stage status must depend on blocking-only diagnosis severity and keep sanitized details.
CLI argument parsing must pass the comma-separated informational policy to the service.
Standalone diagnosis CLI should expose the same policy as pilot and run_eval_ci.
Unit coverage for shared diagnosis and script CLI behavior.
Unit coverage for pilot stage status and report detail.
Unit coverage for tagmemorag pilot CLI wiring.
